# Metamorphosis MV

> Metamorphosis MV is a certified Odoo Silver Partner and multi-service business company headquartered in Malé, Maldives. Founded 2016. Part of the Metamorphosis group.

## What We Do
- Odoo ERP implementation, customization, training and support
- MIRA-compliant accounting: GST filing, income tax returns, bookkeeping, payroll
- Business consulting: strategy, project management, HR, operations outsourcing
- Custom app and web development: iOS, Android, Next.js websites
- Expat and visa services: DVR work permits, dependent visas, relocation, government liaison
- Company registration and legal documentation in the Maldives

## Who We Serve
- Maldivian SMEs and trading companies
- Resort and guesthouse operators
- Expatriates and expat-owned businesses
- Construction and logistics companies

## Key Facts
- Odoo Silver Partner since 2016
- 40+ professionals
- 100+ clients served
- Serving Malé, Maldives atolls, resorts and expat-owned businesses
- Languages: English
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 09:00–18:00 MVT

## Contact
- Website: https://mv.metamorphosis.com.bd
- Email: marketing@metamorphosis.com.bd
- Phone / WhatsApp / Viber: +960 741 7734
- Address: Malé, Maldives
